records.description: Penn State enterprise generative AI platform with access to multiple models through AI Studio's ONEchat interface.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Studio - AI at Penn State
evidence.evidenceSnippet: AI Studio is Penn State's enterprise generative AI platform that provides access to leading AI models in one place. AI Studio is available to employees and all students enrolled in summer classes.

records.rawToolName: Standard Copilot with Enterprise Data Protection
records.description: Penn State Copilot option for AI assistance with enterprise data protection.
records.howToObtain: Use Penn State's Copilot service page and choose Standard Copilot.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Faculty, staff, and students have access to the following Copilot options: Standard Copilot with Enterprise Data Protection.

records.description: Premium Microsoft 365 Copilot option for faculty and staff who need deeper Microsoft 365 integration.
records.howToObtain: Use Penn State's Copilot service page and choose M365 Copilot.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot for Microsoft 365 - a premium AI assistant. M365 Copilot is ideal for faculty and staff who need AI support embedded directly within Microsoft 365 applications.

records.description: Listed by Penn State as a current AI service with institutional data-protection context.
records.howToObtain: Use Penn State's AI Services page.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Services - AI at Penn State
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Penn State provides access to AI tools that include protections for personal and institutional data. Current Services: AI Studio, Standard Copilot, M365 Copilot, Adobe Firefly, Gemini, NotebookLM.

records.description: Penn State Gemini access with added data protection for everyday productivity, writing, coding, and Google Workspace integration.
records.howToObtain: Log in to Gemini from Penn State's Gemini service page.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Penn State's Gemini licensing includes added data protection. To ensure data security, only Level 1 or Level 2 data should be used with Gemini.

records.description: Source-grounded research assistant listed as a Penn State AI service.
records.howToObtain: Log in to NotebookLM from Penn State's NotebookLM service page.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: NotebookLM is a specialized, source-grounded AI-powered research assistant that uses Gemini as its underlying AI engine.

records.description: Enterprise Microsoft Copilot access for University of Leeds users with a full Microsoft licence.
records.howToObtain: Log in with University credentials to use the browser-based Copilot chat.
records.costToUser: Included for users with a full Microsoft licence.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI tools - University of Leeds
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot is a suite of AI-powered productivity solutions developed by Microsoft. Everyone at the University who has a full Microsoft licence can access the browser-based Copilot chat.

records.description: BU generative AI chat platform providing secure access to paid versions of leading AI models.
records.howToObtain: Log in with BU Kerberos credentials at TerrierGPT.
records.costToUser: No charge during the pilot phase.

evidence.sourceTitle: TerrierGPT | AI Development Accelerator - Boston University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: This new AI-powered chat platform is designed to provide our community with secure, flexible, and free access to paid versions of leading AI models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta, and more.
BU faculty, staff, and students have access to the platform with their Kerberos log-in.

records.description: Purdue Microsoft Copilot access with data protection and GPT-4 access for the Purdue community.
records.howToObtain: Sign in with a campus-specific Purdue account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Access to GPT-4 available to Purdue faculty, staff and students
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Purdue University faculty, staff and students have access to GPT-4 through Microsoft Copilot with Data Protection.

evidence.sourceTitle: Access to GPT-4 available to Purdue faculty, staff and students
evidence.evidenceSnippet: To access Copilot with Data Protection, users will need to sign in with their campus-specific Purdue account.
